message:
test(conformance): add event dispatch scenario tests + beads sync

Append ~363 lines of event hook conformance tests to conformance_mock.rs:

- EVENT_HOOK_TS: test extension registering tool_call and turn_start
  event hooks
- event_hook_extension_registers_hooks: verifies event hook registration
  is captured in conformance output
- Event dispatch scenarios testing the mock session's handling of
  lifecycle events through the ConformanceMockSpec infrastructure

Also syncs beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
